# Support

For bug reports or project discussion, use this repository's normal issue flow when issues are enabled.

For paid local Codex workflow setup support related to this repository, use:

- Offer: CodexW Founding Access
- Sample deliverable or proof: https://x2.brucelu.top/codexw/sample/
- Ask a pre-sales question: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=codexw&source=github-support-codex-customize
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/codexw/checkout/?source=github-support-codex-customize

Boundary: paid support is setup/onboarding guidance for local Codex terminal workflows. It does not include OpenAI API credits, guaranteed Codex availability, official OpenAI support, credential-managed services, or changes to OpenAI products.
